CREATE TABLE events (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_name VARCHAR(255), event_time TIMESTAMP(6) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO events (id, event_name, event_time) VALUES (1, 'New Year Celebration', TIMESTAMP '2023-12-31 23:59:00+01:00');
INSERT INTO events (id, event_name, event_time) VALUES (2, 'Midnight Fireworks', TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00+01:00');
SELECT event_name, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' FROM events;
SELECT event_name FROM events WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMP '2023-12-31 20:00:00+00:00';
CREATE TABLE locations (location_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_id INT, timezone VARCHAR(50), FOREIGN KEY (event_id) REFERENCES events(id));
INSERT INTO locations (location_id, event_id, timezone) VALUES (1, 1, 'Europe/Berlin');
INSERT INTO locations (location_id, event_id, timezone) VALUES (2, 2, 'Europe/Berlin');
SELECT e.event_name, l.timezone FROM events e JOIN locations l ON e.id = l.event_id WHERE l.timezone = 'Europe/Berlin';
SELECT e.event_name, e.event_time AT TIME ZONE l.timezone FROM events e JOIN locations l ON e.id = l.event_id;
SELECT event_name, event_time FROM events WHERE event_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2023-12-31 00:00:00+00:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 00:00:00+00:00';
SELECT e.event_name, e.event_time FROM events e WHERE e.event_time > (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM events WHERE event_name = 'Midnight Fireworks');
